svg.text: DP State Shapes — A Mental Library
• dp[i] = answer for prefix ending at i — Fibonacci, climbing stairs, house robber
• dp[i] = best ending exactly at i — Kadane, longest increasing subsequence
• dp[i] = best from i onwards — jump game variants
• dp[i][j] = answer for substring i..j — palindrome partitioning, matrix chain
• dp[i][j] = answer for prefixes of two sequences — LCS, edit distance
• dp[i][k] = best up to i with k-th choice made — buy/sell stock with k transactions
• dp[mask] — bitmask DP, subset enumeration, TSP on small graphs
• dp[i][mask] — assignment problems with O(n · 2^n) complexity
• dp[i][j][k] — extra dimension for state (e.g., last action, parity, count)
• Tree DP — dp[node] computed from dp[children] in post-order traversal
• Digit DP — dp[pos][tight][state] for counting numbers with constraints
• Interval DP — dp[i][j] split at every k between i and j (matrix chain, burst balloons)
Most problems map to one of these shapes — recognise the shape, fill the table.
